character.bio: This sadistic thrillseeker enjoys the strife and suffering of others, taking immense joy in obliterating her foes. Without revenge against M. Bison as a motivator, she whiles away her time in a gloomy haze.

juri_chain_combo_standing_light_punch_l.note: Can be rapid canceledForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_chain_combo_standing_light_kick_l.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_chain_combo_standing_medium_punch_m.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_chain_combo_standing_medium_kick_m.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_standing_heavy_punch_h.note: Forces the opponent into a standing position

juri_standing_heavy_kick_h.note: Forces a juggle state knockdown on Punish Counter, or when it hits as a mid-air Counter or Punish CounterJuggle state time is extended when attack hits a mid-air opponent as a Punish Counter

juri_chain_combo_crouching_light_punch_l.note: Can be rapid canceledForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_chain_combo_crouching_light_kick_l.note: Can be rapid canceledForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_crouching_medium_punch_m.note: 1 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

juri_chain_combo_crouching_medium_punch_.note: 1 frames of recovery added when the attack missesForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_chain_combo_crouching_medium_kick_m.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_crouching_heavy_punch_h.note: Forces the opponent into a standing positionForces a juggle state on Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_chain_combo_crouching_heavy_punch_h.note: Can be canceled into a jump if the attack hits

juri_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

juri_chain_combo_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

juri_chain_combo_jumping_light_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_chain_combo_jumping_light_kick.note: Has cross-up attack propertiesForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_jumping_medium_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_chain_combo_jumping_medium_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_chain_combo_jumping_medium_kick.note: Has cross-up attack propertiesForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_jumping_heavy_punch.note: Has cross-up attack propertiesProduces a slam knockdown

juri_chain_combo_neutral_jumping_heavy_k.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_chain_combo_jumping_heavy_kick.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_kyosesho_m.note: Produces a blowback knockdown during a mid-air combo

juri_chain_combo_kyosesho_m.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_senkai_kick_m.note: * 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

juri_chain_combo_senkai_kick_m.note: * 2 frames of recovery added when the attack missesProduces a slam knockdown

juri_renko_kicks_h.note: * 3 frames of recovery added when the attack missesForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_chain_combo_renko_kicks_h.note: * 3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

juri_korenzan_h.note: Second attack produces a ground bound when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_chain_combo_korenzan_h.note: Second attack produces a ground bound when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_death_crest_3.note: *Can only be canceled into a Super Art on hit

juri_l_fuhajin_l.note: Clashes with projectiles (Once)Adds 1 Fuha stock on frame 10* 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses.

juri_m_fuhajin_m.note: Clashes with projectiles (Once)Adds 1 Fuha stock on frame 13

juri_h_fuhajin_h.note: Clashes with projectiles (Once)Adds 1 Fuha stock on frame 25

juri_od_fuhajin.note: Clashes with projectiles (Once)Adds 1 Fuha stock on frame 16

juri_saihasho_l.context: (Can be followed up with an Ankensatsu or Go Ohsatsu when a Fuha is stocked)
juri_saihasho_l.input: (Can be followed up with an Ankensatsu or Go Ohsatsu when a Fuha is stocked) ↓↘→ + LKLK

juri_boosted_saihasho_l.note: * Can transition to boosted Ankenstatsu or boosted Go Ohsatsu when Fuha is stocked   Cannot use the same attack twice

juri_od_saihasho.context: (Can be followed up with an Ankensatsu or Go Ohsatsu when a Fuha is stocked)
juri_od_saihasho.input: (Can be followed up with an Ankensatsu or Go Ohsatsu when a Fuha is stocked) ↓↘→ + LKLK
juri_od_saihasho.note: * Can transition to Overdrive Ankensatsu or Overdrive Go Ohsatsu when Fuha is stocked   Cannot use the same attack twice

juri_ankensatsu_m.context: (Can be followed up with a Saihasho or Go Ohsatsu when a Fuha is stocked)
juri_ankensatsu_m.input: (Can be followed up with a Saihasho or Go Ohsatsu when a Fuha is stocked) ↓↘→ + MKMK
juri_ankensatsu_m.note: Invincible to mid-air attacks from frames 8 - 27Produces a slam knockdown on hit during active frames 2 - 4 of the attackProduces a slam knockdown on a mid-air hit

juri_boosted_ankensatsu_m.note: Considered airborne from frames 8 - 27* Can transition to boosted Saihasho or boosted Go Ohsatsu when Fuha is stocked   Cannot use the same attack twiceProduces a ground bound during a mid-air hit

juri_od_ankensatsu.context: (Can be followed up with a Saihasho or Go Ohsatsu when a Fuha is stocked)
juri_od_ankensatsu.input: (Can be followed up with a Saihasho or Go Ohsatsu when a Fuha is stocked) ↓↘→ + MKMK
juri_od_ankensatsu.note: Considered airborne from frames 8 - 27* Can transition to Overdrive Saihasho or Overdrive Go Ohsatsu when Fuha is stocked   Cannot use the same attack twiceProduces a ground bound during a mid-air hit

juri_go_ohsatsu_h.context: (Can be followed up with a Saihasho or Ankensatsu when a Fuha is stocked)
juri_go_ohsatsu_h.input: (Can be followed up with a Saihasho or Ankensatsu when a Fuha is stocked) ↓↘→ + HKHK

juri_boosted_go_ohsatsu_h.note: * Can transition to boosted Saihasho or boosted Ankensatsu when Fuha is stocked   Cannot use the same attack twice

juri_od_go_ohsatsu.context: (Can be followed up with a Saihasho or Ankensatsu when a Fuha is stocked)
juri_od_go_ohsatsu.input: (Can be followed up with a Saihasho or Ankensatsu when a Fuha is stocked) ↓↘→ + HKHK
juri_od_go_ohsatsu.note: * Can transition to Overdrive Saihasho or Overdrive Ankensatsu when Fuha is stocked   Cannot use the same attack twice

juri_m_tensenrin_m.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8Considered airborne from frames 8 - 48

juri_h_tensenrin_h.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8Considered airborne from frames 8 - 48

juri_od_tensenrin.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 9Only transitions to the final attack if the attack hits

juri_sa1_sakkai_fuhazan.context: (Hold the button with a Fuha stocked to change effect)
juri_sa1_sakkai_fuhazan.input: (Hold the button with a Fuha stocked to change effect) ↓↘→↓↘→ + K
juri_sa1_sakkai_fuhazan.note: Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 8Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterHold down the button to increase damage by 300

juri_sa2_feng_shui_engine.input: (ボタンホールドで突進) ↓↙←↓↙← + P
juri_sa2_feng_shui_engine.note: Allows you to perform chain combos on the ground or in the air while the technique is activeCan use the same strength attack button or a stronger attack button, but cannot chain down to weaker attacksAll normal attacks and some unique attacks can now cancel into special movesHold down the button during startup to rush forward

juri_sa2_feng_shui_engine_rush.note: Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterHold down the button to rush forwardForces a juggle state knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

juri_sa3_kaisen_dankai_raku.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
juri_sa3_kaisen_dankai_raku.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↙←↓↙← + K
juri_sa3_kaisen_dankai_raku.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 13Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

juri_ca_kaisen_dankai_raku.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
juri_ca_kaisen_dankai_raku.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↙←↓↙← + K
juri_ca_kaisen_dankai_raku.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 13Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

juri_spider_fang_throw.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

juri_shadow_kick_throw.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

juri_zanka_sen.input: (During a jump) (When near opponent) LP + LK
juri_zanka_sen.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

juri_backward_dash.note: Invincible to throws from frame 1 to frame 15.

juri_drive_impact_sekkan_kick.note: Super Armor for 2 attacks from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallOn Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

juri_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
juri_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
juri_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

juri_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

juri_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
juri_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
juri_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution.

juri_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

juri_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

juri_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

juri_cancel_drive_rush.level: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)  (  )  MM
juri_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
juri_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
